calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Berta L. Martinezbanos.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:47:24 a.m., pausing at 10:49:09 a.m., reconvening at 10:51:13 a.m. and concluding at 10:58:16 a.m.

Plaintiff Department Stores National Bank represented by Brian Langedyk, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Berta L. Martinezbanos not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court takes judicial notice of Order Granting Plaintiff's Motion for Order that Matters in Request for Admission of Truth of Facts be Admitted filed Sep-12-2022 and Notice of Time and Place of Trial and Trial Order filed on Sep-26-2022.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 1 - Monthly Statements (P. 2-55)
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 2 - Account Agreement (P. 56-66)
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 3 - Account Application (P. 67)

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff's counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint and Defendant's failure to pay on the credit card agreement.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Department Stores National Bank, and against Defendant Berta L. Martinezbanos, as follows:

1. Damages: $2,136.08
2. Costs: $353.50

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $2,489.58

Proposed judgment signed and filed.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2022 Set For Trial On Feb-27-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted Memorandum In Support Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Sep-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK's Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed Motion is granted. The truth of all specified facts in the Request for Admissions, Set One, propounded by plaintiff Department Stores National Bank on defendant Berta L Martinezbanos by mail on May 26, 2022, are deemed admitted.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
